masked_case_json.world_change: a biotech has a clean binary late-stage trial catalyst in a large indication. the mechanism is plausible, but the thesis depends on a statistical endpoint the investor cannot de-risk from public narrative alone. the trial then fails to reach statistical significance on the primary endpoint.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Underlying: Regeneron fianlimab/cemiplimab Phase 3 melanoma trial. Primary source: company release stating the trial did not reach statistical significance on the PFS primary endpoint. Correct behavior is no_trade or explicitly tiny event sizing, not high-confidence long. Do not expose this field to the model during decision generation.
